places.name: Laurence Hutton Collection of Life and Death Masks
places.description: One man's lifelong obsession with death.

places.name: Princeton Cemetery
places.description: The final resting place of many of New Jersey's most famous residents, including U.S. history's most in-vogue antagonist, Aaron Burr.

places.name: Princeton Chapel Bulldog
places.description: The mysterious canine hides atop a drain pipe on the back of the building, some say as a sneaky shoutout to Yale.

places.name: Nassau Hall
places.description: Nassau Hall has served as army barracks, a museum, and played a key role in the American Revolution.
